com.jsyn.unitgen

Class UnitGenerator

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.jsyn.unitgen.UnitGenerator
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    BrownNoise, ChannelIn, ChannelOut, Circuit, CrossFade, DualInTwoOut, FFTBase, FourWayFade, GrainFarm, Integrate, LatchZeroCrossing, LineIn, LineOut, MixerMono, MultiChannelScopeProbeUnit, MultiplyAdd, Pan, PanControl, ParabolicEnvelope, PeakFollower, PinkNoise, PitchDetector, PowerOfTwo, Select, SequentialDataReader, SequentialDataWriter, SpectralFFT, SpectralIFFT, SpectralProcessor, TwoInDualOut, UnitBinaryOperator, UnitFilter, UnitGate, UnitOscillator, UnitStreamWriter, WhiteNoise, ZeroCrossingCounter

    public abstract class UnitGenerator
extends java.lang.Object
    Base class for all unit generators.
    Author:
    Phil Burk (C) 2009 Mobileer Inc

      • isEnabled

        public boolean isEnabled()

      • setEnabled

        public void setEnabled(boolean enabled)
        If enabled, then a unit will execute if its output is connected to another unit that is executed. If not enabled then it will not execute and will not pull data from units that are connected to its inputs. Disabling a unit at the output of a tree of units can be used to turn off the entire tree, thus saving CPU cycles.
        Parameters:
        enabled -
        See Also:
        UnitGate.setupAutoDisable(UnitGenerator), start

      • isStartRequired

        public boolean isStartRequired()
        Some units, for example LineOut and FixedRateMonoWriter, will only work if started explicitly. Other units will run when downstream units are started.
        Returns:
        true if you should call start() for this unit

      • start

        public void start()
        Start executing this unit directly by adding it to a "run list" of units in the synthesis engine. This method is normally only called for the final unit in a chain, for example a LineOut. When that final unit executes it will "pull" data from any units connected to its inputs. Those units will then pull data their inputs until the entire chain is executed. If units are connected in a circle then this will be detected and the infinite recursion will be blocked.
        See Also:
        setEnabled

      • start

        public void start(double time)
        Start a unit at the specified time.
        Parameters:
        time -
        See Also:
        start
